title: Terms and conditions
description: Operational framework for bookings, payments, support, and use of the public site.
heading: Terms and conditions
summary: This page explains how booking, operational validation, and care continuity are organized inside the public website.

highlights.title: An appointment is confirmed through schedule, data, and operational validation.
highlights.body: Each service may require additional support, payment, or manual confirmation according to mode and live availability.

highlights.title: Rescheduling and cancellation follow a visible public policy.
highlights.body: Lead time, live availability, and payment state define the next step.

sections.title: Service scope
sections.body: The site organizes public information, service routes, and booking for in-person or telemedicine care.
items: Published prices can be reference or entry prices.
Final indication depends on medical assessment.
Care mode can change according to clinical criteria.

sections.title: Bookings and payments
sections.body: Booking continuity depends on live schedule, payment method, and case validation.
items: Availability can close if another reservation confirms first.
Preparation requirements are disclosed before confirmation.
No-show and refund policies apply according to channel and case.
